title: The Wizard's Tower
description: A legendary wizard vanished decades ago, leaving behind a tower full of enchantments and traps. You've been hired to retrieve the Archmage's Spellbook from the sanctum at the top. Navigate magical puzzles, craft enchanted tools, and unlock ancient secrets.
author: Temple Adventure Team

tower_gate.name: Tower Gate
tower_gate.description:
You stand before a crumbling stone tower that rises into the clouds. Ivy
creeps up the walls and gargoyles leer down from the parapets.

A massive iron door blocks the entrance north. A rusted keyhole is set
into its center. Beside the door, a weathered sign hangs crooked on one nail.
tower_gate.description_after_puzzle: The iron door hangs open, revealing a torchlit entrance hall beyond.

entrance_hall.name: Entrance Hall
entrance_hall.description:
A grand entrance hall stretches before you, lit by enchanted torches that
flicker with blue flame. Dust motes drift through the air like tiny stars.

A faded tapestry covers the east wall. Doorways lead east to what looks
like a library, and west to a cluttered workshop. Above you, a spiral
staircase leads up, but a shimmering rune barrier blocks the way.

A stone panel covered in arcane runes is mounted beside the staircase.
entrance_hall.description_after_puzzle:
The rune barrier has dissolved. Blue torchlight illuminates the open
staircase leading up. Doorways lead east and west.

library.name: The Library
library.description:
Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves line every wall, packed with leather-bound
tomes and rolled scrolls. A reading desk sits in the center, covered in
dust. The air smells of old paper and candle wax.

One book on the desk looks recently disturbed — an arcane tome with a
glowing clasp. A faint red shimmer catches your eye from a high shelf.

workshop.name: The Workshop
workshop.description:
Workbenches line the walls, cluttered with half-finished inventions and
strange contraptions. Gears, springs, and glass vials are scattered
everywhere. A forge sits cold in the corner.

A polished glass lens sits on one bench, and a sturdy metal frame
leans against the wall nearby. Something blue glints from a shelf
above the forge.

upper_hall.name: Upper Hall
upper_hall.description:
The spiral staircase opens into a circular hall with arched windows.
Moonlight streams in, casting long shadows across the stone floor.

A heavy door to the east is carved with crystal patterns. To the north,
an ornate door bears a large runic dial at its center — clearly some
kind of combination lock.

A green crystal is embedded in a wall sconce, loose enough to pry free.
upper_hall.description_after_puzzle:
The combination door to the north stands open, revealing a domed
observatory beyond. The crystal door to the east leads to the crystal chamber.

crystal_chamber.name: Crystal Chamber
crystal_chamber.description:
A hexagonal chamber glitters with embedded crystals in every wall.
In the center stands a stone altar with three empty crystal sockets
arranged in a triangle. An inscription reads:

'Three lights united shall reveal the path above.'

A circular hatch in the ceiling is sealed by a crystalline lock.
crystal_chamber.description_after_puzzle:
The three crystals blaze with light in the altar. The ceiling hatch
has opened, revealing a ladder leading up to the observatory.

observatory.name: The Observatory
observatory.description:
A vast domed chamber opens above you, the ceiling an intricate mechanism
of brass rings and crystal lenses — an enormous orrery depicting the
celestial spheres. A telescope-like apparatus points upward through an
opening in the dome.

The orrery's central mount has an empty socket where a lens should go.
A brass lever protrudes from the base of the mechanism.

A sealed door to the north is covered in star-shaped locks.
observatory.description_after_puzzle:
The orrery hums with focused starlight, its beam striking the north
door. The star-locks have dissolved, revealing the sanctum beyond.

sanctum.name: The Archmage's Sanctum
sanctum.description:
A small, perfectly preserved chamber at the very top of the tower.
Starlight pours through a crystal dome overhead. The walls are covered
in shimmering constellations that slowly rotate.

At the center, floating above a marble pedestal, is the legendary
Archmage's Spellbook. Its pages flutter gently though there is no wind.
Arcane energy crackles around it like captured lightning.

tower_key.name: iron key
tower_key.description: A heavy iron key, green with age. Its teeth are worn but still intact.

iron_door.name: iron door
iron_door.description: A massive iron door set into the stone archway. Despite its age, it looks incredibly solid. A rusted keyhole is set into its center.

weathered_sign.name: weathered sign
weathered_sign.description: A wooden sign hanging by one nail beside the door.
weathered_sign.examine_text:
The faded text reads: 'Tower of Archmage Valdris. KEEP OUT.
Trespassers will be polymorphed.'
Someone has scrawled beneath it: 'He's been gone for thirty years. Just walk in.'

rune_panel.name: rune panel
rune_panel.description: A stone panel mounted beside the staircase, covered in arcane runes arranged in a grid. The runes glow faintly with residual magic.

faded_tapestry.name: faded tapestry
faded_tapestry.description: A once-magnificent tapestry depicting the wizard Valdris at work.
faded_tapestry.examine_text:
The tapestry shows Valdris surrounded by floating crystals — three of them,
one red, one blue, one green — arranged in a triangle above an altar.
Beneath the image, embroidered text reads:
'Three lights united shall reveal the path above.'

arcane_tome.name: arcane tome
arcane_tome.description: A thick leather-bound tome with a clasp that glows with faint blue light. It looks like the wizard's personal research journal.
arcane_tome.examine_text:
You open the tome carefully. Most pages are filled with incomprehensible
formulae, but one page is bookmarked with a silk ribbon:

'Rune barrier bypass: trace the pattern STAR-MOON-STAR-SUN on the panel.
The barrier will dissolve. — V.'

Another entry catches your eye: 'The observatory lock requires exactly
four turns of the runic dial. No more, no less.'

red_crystal.name: red crystal
red_crystal.description: A brilliant red crystal that pulses with warm inner light. It hums faintly when you hold it.

blue_crystal.name: blue crystal
blue_crystal.description: A deep blue crystal that seems to contain swirling mist. It's cool to the touch.

green_crystal.name: green crystal
green_crystal.description: A vivid green crystal embedded in a wall sconce. It comes free with a gentle tug.

crystal_altar.name: crystal altar
crystal_altar.description: A stone altar with three empty sockets arranged in a triangle. An inscription reads: 'Three lights united shall reveal the path above.'

broken_wand.name: broken wand
broken_wand.description: A snapped wand of dark wood. Whatever magic it once held is long gone.
broken_wand.examine_text:
The wand is split clean in two. Scorch marks suggest it broke during
a particularly ambitious spell. Probably best not to try using it.

glass_lens.name: glass lens
glass_lens.description: A perfectly ground glass lens, clear as water. It focuses light into a tight beam when held up.

metal_frame.name: metal frame
metal_frame.description: A sturdy metal frame shaped to hold something circular. Etched runes line its edges — it was clearly designed for a magical purpose.

focusing_lens.name: enchanted focusing lens
focusing_lens.description: A glass lens mounted in an etched metal frame. The runes along the frame glow softly, and the lens bends light in impossible ways.

dusty_blueprint.name: dusty blueprint
dusty_blueprint.description: A large rolled blueprint pinned to the workbench.
dusty_blueprint.examine_text:
The blueprint shows detailed plans for an 'Enchanted Focusing Lens'.
The notes read: 'Combine a ground glass lens with an etched metal frame.
The runes will activate automatically upon assembly.
Required for the orrery's celestial alignment mechanism.'

runic_dial.name: runic dial
runic_dial.description: A large circular dial mounted on the north door, covered in shifting runes. It looks like it can be turned. A small plaque reads: 'Patience reveals the way.'

stone_plaque.name: stone plaque
stone_plaque.description: A small stone plaque mounted on the wall near the dial.
stone_plaque.examine_text:
The plaque reads: 'Four turns, no more, no less.
Each turn brings you closer. Rush, and the dial resets.'

orrery.name: celestial orrery
orrery.description: An enormous brass mechanism depicting the celestial spheres. Crystal lenses and brass rings rotate slowly. A central mount has an empty socket where a focusing lens should go.

brass_lever.name: brass lever
brass_lever.description: A polished brass lever at the base of the orrery mechanism. A label reads: 'CELESTIAL ALIGNMENT — Pull to begin. Warning: alignment window is brief.'

star_chart.name: star chart
star_chart.description: A detailed star chart mounted on the observatory wall.
star_chart.examine_text:
The chart shows celestial alignment patterns. A note in the margin reads:
'When the lever is pulled, you have roughly 6 turns before the alignment
window closes. Place the focusing lens in the orrery mount before then,
or the mechanism locks and resets. If it fails... the energy discharge
will blast you back down to the crystal chamber.'

spellbook.name: Archmage's Spellbook
spellbook.description: The legendary spellbook of Archmage Valdris, floating above a marble pedestal. Its pages flutter with arcane energy, and captured lightning crackles across its binding.

puzzles.name: The Tower Door
puzzles.description: Use the iron key to unlock the tower entrance.
puzzles.completion_text: You slide the iron key into the lock and turn. The mechanism groans, then clicks. The massive door swings inward with a rush of stale air.
puzzles.lock_fail_text: The door is locked. You need a key.

puzzles.name: The Rune Barrier
puzzles.description: Decipher the arcane tome and disable the rune barrier blocking the staircase.
puzzles.source_learn_text: The tome reveals the bypass pattern: STAR-MOON-STAR-SUN.
puzzles.target_success_text: You trace the pattern on the panel: star, moon, star, sun. The runes flare bright blue, then fade. The shimmering barrier above the staircase dissolves into sparkling motes of light.
puzzles.target_fail_text: You touch the runes, but without knowing the correct pattern, nothing happens. The barrier shimmers mockingly.
puzzles.completion_text: The rune barrier dissolves! The staircase spirals upward, free of obstruction.
puzzles.lock_fail_text: The rune barrier still shimmers. You need to enter the correct pattern first.

puzzles.name: Craft the Focusing Lens
puzzles.description: Combine the glass lens and metal frame to create an enchanted focusing lens.
puzzles.combine_text: You seat the glass lens into the metal frame. The moment it clicks into place, the etched runes along the frame blaze to life with blue light. The lens shimmers — you've created an enchanted focusing lens!
puzzles.combine_fail_text: You turn the lens over in your hands. It needs to be mounted in something.
puzzles.completion_text: The focusing lens is assembled and ready.

puzzles.name: The Runic Dial
puzzles.description: Turn the runic dial the correct number of times to open the observatory door.
combination_texts: You turn the dial. The first rune lights up with a soft chime. Three more to go.
Another turn. The second rune ignites. The dial hums with building energy.
A third turn. Three runes glow in sequence. The door begins to vibrate.
The fourth turn! All four runes blaze with golden light. The door shudders and swings open with a rush of cool night air!

puzzles.name: The Crystal Ritual
puzzles.description: Collect three crystals scattered through the tower and place them in the altar.

counter_item_texts.red_crystal: You place the red crystal in the first socket. It flares to life with warm crimson light!
counter_item_texts.blue_crystal: You place the blue crystal in the second socket. Cool blue light joins the red!
counter_item_texts.green_crystal: You place the green crystal in the final socket. Emerald light completes the triangle!

puzzles.completion_text: The three crystals blaze in unison! A beam of white light shoots upward from the altar, and the ceiling hatch grinds open, revealing a ladder to the observatory above.

puzzles.name: Celestial Alignment
puzzles.description: Place the focusing lens in the orrery before the alignment window closes.
puzzles.trigger_text:
You pull the brass lever! The orrery roars to life — brass rings spin, crystal lenses rotate, and a beam of concentrated starlight shoots down through the dome. The central mount glows white-hot, waiting for a focusing lens.

A timer appears on the mechanism: 'ALIGNMENT WINDOW: 6 TURNS REMAINING.'
puzzles.failure_text: The alignment window closes! The orrery screeches to a halt, and a massive discharge of energy blasts through the chamber. You're hurled backward through the floor hatch, tumbling down into the crystal chamber. The hatch seals above you with a crystalline snap.
puzzles.fetch_success_text: You slam the enchanted focusing lens into the orrery's mount! The lens catches the starlight beam and focuses it into a searing point of brilliance. The beam strikes the north door — the star-shaped locks glow white, then dissolve one by one.
puzzles.completion_text: The orrery hums with perfect celestial harmony. The north door stands open, bathed in focused starlight. The sanctum awaits.

puzzles.name: Claim the Spellbook
puzzles.win_text:
You reach out and grasp the Archmage's Spellbook. The moment your fingers touch the binding, the floating enchantment dissolves. The book settles into your hands, warm and heavy with accumulated knowledge.

The constellations on the walls spin faster, then freeze — forming an arrow pointing to the floor. A hidden staircase spirals downward, leading all the way to the tower's base.

You descend with the spellbook clutched to your chest, emerging into the cool night air. The tower's gargoyles seem to nod approvingly as you walk away.

Congratulations, adventurer! The Archmage's Spellbook is yours!
